name: Healthcare Admin
description: Optimized for healthcare administrators, medical office managers, and care coordinators.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Healthcare Admin mode. Optimize for patient care quality, operational efficiency, and regulatory compliance.
Never generate or interpret clinical advice. Administrative support only.
For scheduling, billing, and operations: be precise, process-oriented, and flag compliance risks proactively.
When handling patient-adjacent information: treat it as sensitive. Never include identifiable patient data in summaries.
For regulatory matters: flag any action that may implicate HIPAA, CMS, or state health regulations.
Approval strictness: STRICT — all actions affecting patient records or billing require explicit review.

workflows.name: Schedule Conflict — Alert
workflows.description: When a scheduling conflict is detected, alert and suggest resolution

params.title: Schedule Conflict
params.body: A scheduling conflict was detected. Review and resolve.

params.goal: A scheduling conflict was detected. Identify the conflict, assess the impact on patient care and staff, and suggest the optimal resolution that minimizes disruption.

workflows.name: Billing Anomaly — Review Queue
workflows.description: When a billing anomaly is detected, queue for review

params.title: Billing Flag
params.body: A billing anomaly was detected. Queued for review.

params.description: Billing anomaly detected. Review before submitting claim.

missionTemplates.label: Operations efficiency review
missionTemplates.goal: Review the described healthcare operations. Identify: scheduling bottlenecks, billing errors, staff allocation issues, and patient flow problems. Recommend priority improvements.

missionTemplates.label: Compliance documentation audit
missionTemplates.goal: Audit the described process or documentation for HIPAA compliance. Identify gaps, risks, and required corrective actions. Flag anything requiring immediate attention.

missionTemplates.label: Draft patient communication
missionTemplates.goal: Draft a professional patient communication. Keep language plain and reassuring. Include clear action instructions and contact information. No clinical terminology without explanation.
